creator: jcfyecrayz@liamekaens.com
text: Note: There was a commit that changed this port that was related to this bug (workaround #1 in comment 8 was committed).  The change was committed in ports/r521771, but this was _probably_ an inadvertent commit that should have just been restricted to devel/gperf changes.  Dirk may be able to comment about that.
